# ~~getRegisteredTools()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getRegisteredTools(server: McpServer): Record<string, unknown>;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts:49](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts#L49)

Retrieves the internal `_registeredTools` map from an
[McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) via [Reflect.get](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference).

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                  | Description                                                                                     |
| --------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | [`McpServer`](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) | The [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) instance to introspect. |

## Returns

[`Record`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<`string`, `unknown`>

A plain record mapping tool names to their configuration
objects.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  The Effect-TS
migration removed Zod-based tool registration; use `tools/list`
via the MCP protocol instead.

## Remarks

Throws if the private `_registeredTools` property is missing or
not an object—this guards against silent SDK changes.

## Throws

If the server does not expose `_registeredTools`.
